title: Ezerwoo's Modpack v2
description: A more peaceful version of Minecraft with a focus on a love of animals.
body: This modpack includes mods to eliminate the need to harm animals. It adds even more animals than the base game provides such as shrimp and ferrets. Mods to make the end less stressful and more interesting to be in. Tons of furniture mods and mods that add more versions of each block to increase the building possibilities. I hope you enjoy!
